Container.Name: VVV Token Watch
Container.Overview:
Web dashboard for monitoring Venice AI API usage, balances, and token prices.
Features: - Real-time usage tracking across all API keys - Balance and daily limit monitoring - VVV and DIEM token price tracking - Portfolio value calculation
Requires an external PostgreSQL database.
Container.Requires:
Requires an external PostgreSQL database. Create a database before starting the container.
Example PostgreSQL setup: docker run -d --name=postgres -e POSTGRES_DB=vvvwatch -e POSTGRES_USER=vvvwatch -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=yourpassword postgres:15-alpine

Config.Name: Venice Admin Key
Config.Description: Your Venice AI Admin API key (required for usage tracking)

Config.Name: App Password
Config.Description: Required: shared password protecting the web UI and API. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 24

Config.Name: CoinGecko API Key
Config.Description: Optional: CoinGecko Pro API key for higher rate limits

Config.Name: VVV Holdings
Config.Description: Your VVV token holdings for portfolio calculation

Config.Name: DIEM Holdings
Config.Description: Your DIEM token holdings for portfolio calculation

Config.Name: Data Directory
Config.Description: Path for persistent logs and data (e.g. /mnt/user/appdata/vvv-token-watch)

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Logging verbosity: DEBUG shows full API request/response detail, INFO is normal operation
